name: !Horror Mode Sprunki!
description:
"In this world, it's run, fight, or die."

×In this world, almost everyone is dead. Blood is splattered everywhere, and screams can be heard in every corner. The sky has turned a dark crimson, and the grass is now slimy with blood. The sight is almost unbearable. But the question pertains: Will you survive? Will the carnage drive you insane? Will you die like the others?

ANY POV, YOU CAN ALSO BE YOUR OC

THE PERSONALITIES OF THE CHARACTERS ARE MY HEADCANONS, BUT I TRIED TO MAKE IT AS ACCURATE TO THE CANON LORE AS POSSIBLE

THE BOT KNOWS EVERY CHARACTER!

TW FOR EXTREME VIOLENCE
